textByHash.06afa2662aa44837884d357b72b0a3ee41c2aa4c: Arrr... well, ye can boast of yer ignorance if ye likes, but it don't make ye sound smarter.
textByHash.0736b480ea0331344990a9473df349dd54cc4d32: Ahoy, young lass. Might ye be able to help me, perhaps? I be in a spot of bother.
textByHash.0cc0fd47a6d165f562002035d4b726ffb6353d5c: Well, as I were saying, young lass, I be in a spot of bother, and I thought ye might be able to help.
textByHash.1161faa786df07a7f47bf32797c3dbe90e492b2c: Arrr, I don't rightly know. It began when I'd gone away for a parlay with Ithoi; we came back ter find the crew all a-pukin' up their dinner. Then Ithoi felt ill too, though he'd not eaten with 'em, so it can't be the food.
textByHash.15509560ff03d1f9646a9c2dd84fdc4a711f5404: Thank ye fer dealing with that serpent. I suppose the rest of my crew will feel better now ye've proven there be no curse on them.
textByHash.17a1aa647774a9a9e8afc54b64f43eba03f283e6: Arrr, maybe I am, but I'm sure that be nothing to do wi' the curse. Ithoi's afflicted by it too.
textByHash.1f6ad74f26cd519c0c645f3015a3cb091f9b19b2: Ahoy, young lad. Might ye be able to help me, perhaps? I be in a spot of bother.
textByHash.201d02e007bd8b1863e75d789ff84cf54a5c8113: Arrr! Thanks, young lad. And a worthy lass ye must surely be, brave in the heart and stiff in the spine.
textByHash.26af4b6b9f7dec155d7dbd52cfd189e125499a42: Arrr, ye've found my ship - good lad. I used to command a much larger vessel, sailing the seas with my crew of Corsairs, but now we be settled in Corsair Cove.
textByHash.33d00f1edb351e6f282f17cac76565abb29ad650: Arrr, that be likely enough. Ithoi tells me there be many things in this world that can bring a curse upon an unwary seafarer.
textByHash.4064d094ed2b7ec72e3b0df4b7793b01906de762: Ye can maybe solve the problem fer each victim, an' see if it lifts the curse.
textByHash.4c4ddd1b0c26f9d46670dbec90ae779dca1d4ec1: That's fair enough, young lass, but perhaps ye'll return to help me soon...
textByHash.4c6d6320879d69378302a5bfeb6f1466d7b3f5e9: Well, ye could maybe explore the ogre caves. Arsen says the ogres be fearsome, though, so watch yer step. An' there be places for ye to train yer skills, over to the west.
textByHash.5391a057641ccdfd3d9d688941c48360ead5f74a: Anyways, ye've been a mighty help, young lass. Ye be brave in the heart, strong in the arm and full in the bowels, an' I be grateful to ye.
textByHash.54b7e67d79d5f170317fdc461f27cf46d31dee10: Arrr! Thanks, young lass. And a worthy lass ye must surely be, brave in the heart and stiff in the spine.
textByHash.67e43d394fab4d722d7392dab5cb0b6a49ff8884: Arrr, 'tis the young lass who helped save my crew from that scoundrel, Ithoi! How be ye this fine day?
textByHash.6c63f0f5fc640323f861cdc055664afa6cd97d01: There be four of 'em afflicted by the curse - Gnocci, Ithoi, Arsen and young Colin. All taken to their beds, a- mewlin' and a-pukin' like so many babbies.
textByHash.6d77d87d2637dd8d51b330b07715ebcf6f43606a: Now be ye ready to voyage to Corsair Cove to help 'em? I can sail ye back here any time ye likes.
textByHash.6e41e4549eb4f7e3767c2aab1799754553c925c8: It be about my crew. They be a lazy bunch at times, but they be stout in the heart and strong in the arm, and they don't deserve what's happened to them...
textByHash.7e1d9a0d1b8f23800ea10262ebc79d57d9cefd38: Arrr! Thanks, young lass. And a worthy lad ye must surely be, brave in the heart and stiff in the spine.
textByHash.7e3d50d8608df4ac2ce448567c86553b33393b9a: Most of them deleterious effects probably be psychosomatic anyway, arrr!
textByHash.7ebd60a61a52c38571e91dbb887afbf68c7233b8: Anyways, ye've been a mighty help, young lad. Ye be brave in the heart, strong in the arm and full in the bowels, an' I be grateful to ye.
textByHash.8121127a9038d0de4e335d28bd6e2c7722b77f2a: Arrr! Make sure ye speaks to 'em all. They'll be in their huts, over to the west. Four of them, there are - Gnocci, Ithoi, Arsen and young Colin.
textByHash.85ef630590635aa2139fc79d2e3d240e8c0a458a: That's fair enough, young lad, but perhaps ye'll return to help me soon...
textByHash.8d3282335db68629bcb05b5a8ba15493068e45c1: It be a curse! A curse has been laid upon my crew! That's the only thing it can be.
textByHash.92504194847a7f921d99d4a47e938f98d9167271: So I need a young lass such as yerself to find a way to lift the curse. Will ye help me?
textByHash.92d1ee6d0b461669564b7407a41bbbf5bb34ec07: Now, I've a ship moored west of Rimmington. Come and meet me on board, and we'll set off to Corsair Cove.
textByHash.95dd42427a8b8f6e9ede7e97e4c944db7db7a605: If ye wants a ride back to Rimmington, I'll take ye there any time, but I do hope ye can help my poor crew.
textByHash.9c31184fea8a927e73c26c18b578fb6d94f168ba: My Corsairs be a good crew, but this curse has laid them low, all except me. Sickly, they be. Too weak to stand. Ye'll see fer yerself soon enough.
textByHash.a33a8b9f1aaefaf7f13d470267971413625cec28: Have ye any idea about how to lift the curse?
textByHash.b675f8d2f9c4f44e4ad56e6aad53b778a85bc82c: Arrr, 'tis the young lad who helped save my crew from that scoundrel, Ithoi! How be ye this fine day?
textByHash.bd9d6874f128e66bdb87f88097e6b60cb1d72130: That can't be! Ithoi's sick, an' he may be babbling madness from his fevered brain. Ye'll have to prove he's not really sick.
textByHash.be022a62f75b138677778d790a520e811711d976: I be the Corsair Captain! Captain of the Corsairs of Corsair Cove! My gallant band of corsairs are famed in song and story among all seafarers.
textByHash.c15de6a66a46ab7db00f4abd05c1d8cd0e1f3831: Arrr! Thanks, young lad. And a worthy lad ye must surely be, brave in the heart and stiff in the spine.
textByHash.cb525e7b18f8dfe5be772028bd711978b693ad4b: Well, as I were saying, young lad, I be in a spot of bother, and I thought ye might be able to help.
textByHash.d601e272757bb3218e66d8571a3414f3fc0743db: Arrr. I'd gone away for a parlay with Ithoi; we came back ter find the crew all a-pukin' up their dinner. Then Ithoi felt ill too, though he'd not eaten with 'em, so it can't be the food.
textByHash.db80609b946898c4c6d4a4821231fc500b89f2cd: A captain shouldn't leave his ship in a time of crisis. Rule of the sea, that is. Even if the crisis ain't exactly on the ship.
textByHash.ddc020ca9d8545c0d7792c51867c2d193a5543f2: Tell ye what, I'll have a word with Yusuf, in the bank. Ye've earned the right to use his services. An' thanks again, very much.
textByHash.de2a82d501b8a7611d631697642ae351f5acc525: Arrr! So he was never sick at all! An' here's me been feeling sorry for him. A trickster he be indeed! Kill him fer me.
textByHash.dee88d00ab89461b1fc0afe0224938386d727bbc: Arrr, ye've found my ship - good lass. I used to command a much larger vessel, sailing the seas with my crew of Corsairs, but now we be settled in Corsair Cove.
textByHash.e026a154b58c8f524b67fb6ca8a779ed3b07b44d: So I need a young lad such as yerself to find a way to lift the curse. Will ye help me?
textByHash.e6a3c5d25d52f58c6e0c34e8a3a569c8319670e0: Arrr, any sufficiently advanced technology be indistinguishable from demonic possession, that it be.
textByHash.ecc3fa9fa3d379a0ef86f83f2b8f35645fe49140: Arrr, that he did. I'd sent him to explore the caves west of the cove, an' he brings me back a bone lump, saying he stole it from the ogre chief.
textByHash.ef8efb4ac2994f12e285d8d6f0e4681edbde4c9d: Arrr, ye looks fine. Stiff in the spine, firm in the mind an' long in the leg. 'Tis good to see ye again.
textByHash.f7cda6ae49226902e535b9e91719e9cff3c18812: I've another crewman, Francois, but he be away on a mission. I hope he be spared!
textByHash.fb8b61c806328ba5c71cac1c528697bda63b2881: Arrr, I've no use fer the silly thing. If it'll get the curse lifted, ye can take it right to that ogre chief an' give it back.
